docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OROZCO, RAFAEL ,AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT ELIAS, JOSUE ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
